article_meta.title: Business Climate change study that overestimated economic impact is pulled — but not before banks relied on it By Taylor Herzlich Published Dec

reasoning: The model avoided attributing quoted text as author bias and flagged some defensible author-prose framing (headline, emphasis). Overall, moderate failures driven mainly by bias type inaccuracies.
